changeSummary: Initial draft-state lineage node for helios/example-policy-revision. Root of the lineage chain; no parent version. Created at proposal time by helios:proposer:gov-drafting-team. Lifecycle state remains draft until the steward commits via a separate draft->active transition; the propose->review->commit operator arc is recorded in the audit-record stream rather than as additional lineage nodes during the draft-state annotation cycle.
